YELENA SHEYNAMKMAN INTERPRETS ENGLISH/RUSSIAN - RUSSIAN/ENGLISH FOR PLAINTIFF. CONNIE LAI INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE- -CANTONESE/ENGLISH FOR DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
